a11y.skipToMain: Tlola ho ea ho litaba tse kholo

keys.backupCreated: Backup ea senotlolo e entsoe le ho khoasolla ✓
keys.restored: Backup ea senotlolo e tsosolositsoe ✓ Linotlolo li kentsoe sebakeng sa lehae
keys.noBackup: Ha ho backup e sireletsoeng e teng bakeng sa akhaonto ena
keys.missingPublicKey: Backup e haellang senotlolo sa sechaba

keySetup.title: Hlahisa linotlolo tsa sesebelisoa sa hau
keySetup.description: Sesebelisoa sena ha se na senotlolo sa hau sa poraefete hajoale. Kenya backup e sireletsoeng ka password, kapa hlahisa pair e ncha ea linotlolo (u tla khona ho bala melaetsa e ncha ho tloha joale).
keySetup.imported: Senotlolo sa poraefete se kentsoe sesebelisoeng sena. U ka bala melaetsa ea khale hona joale.
keySetup.enterPassword: Kenya password ea akhaonto ea hau e le hore re ka boloka linotlolo tsa hau ka tšireletso.

auth.headline: Melaetsa e sireletsehileng bakeng sa mang kapa mang, kae kapa kae
auth.description: Ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong, phetolelo ho lipuo tse 100+, melaetsa e nyamelang, le ho letsetsa ka lentsoe/video.

feature.encryption: Ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong ka ho iketsa
feature.translation: Phetolelo e bohlale e hahiloeng ka har'a molaetsa
feature.disappearing: Melaetsa e nyamelang & litlaleho tsa ho bala
feature.privacy: Tšireletso ea pele. Lintlha tsa hau, taolo ea hau.
feature.translate: Phetolelo e bohlale e hahiloeng ka har'a molaetsa

hero.line1: Melaetsa e sireletsehileng bakeng sa mang kapa mang, kae kapa kae — ka
hero.sub: Fumana nomoro ea mohala e sireletsehileng ea mahala ho letsetsa le ho romella melaetsa lefats'eng ka bophara ho Wi-Fi kapa data. Natefeloa ke ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong, melaetsa e nyamelang, le ho letsetsa ka HD ka lentsoe/video — ka lisebelisoa tse hahiloeng ka har'a tsona tse u thusang ho lula u hokahane ho feta meeli.
hero.freeNote: Ho letsetsa le ho romella melaetsa tsa mantlha li mahala. Lits'ebetso tsa AI tse tsoetseng pele le likarolo tsa premium li hloka ntlafatso.

feat.encryption: Ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong, kamehla ho butsoe
feat.translate: Tlosa meeli ea lipuo moqoqong oa hau
feat.disappear: Melaetsa e nyamelang & litlaleho tsa ho bala
feat.privacy: Tšireletso ea pele. Lintlha tsa hau, taolo ea hau.

auth.desktopTip: U le desktop? Skena ka mohala oa hau ho fumana app.
auth.scanHelper: U le desktop? Skena ka mohala oa hau ho fumana app.
auth.subhead: Melaetsa e poraefete, e sireletsehileng, le e fetoleloang — hang-hang.
auth.tip: Keletso: Sebelisa akhaonto e le 'ngoe ho web le mohala. Melaetsa ea hau e lula e lumellane.
auth.scanHint: Skena ho khoasolla app kapa u bula ho sebatli sa hau.

registration.passwordDescription: Bonyane litlhaku tse 6. Sebelisa password e matla, e ikhethang.
registration.smsConsent: Ka ho bopa akhaonto, u lumellana ho amohela litsebiso tsa SMS tse amanang le ts'ebetso ea hau ea Chatforia (joalo ka melaetsa e tsoang ho basebelisi ba bang). Litefiso tsa molaetsa & data li ka sebetsa. U ka khetha ho tsoa nako efe kapa efe ho Settings.

auth.addRecipient: Kenya moamoheli ka holimo ho qala…
auth.oneRecipient: Ka kopo kenya moamoheli a le mong hajoale.
auth.enterValidRecipient: Kenya lebitso la motho ea bolokiloeng kapa nomoro ea mohala.
auth.sendFailed: Ho romella ho hlolehile. Sheba console bakeng sa lintlha.

chat.selectPrompt: Khetha mongolo kapa kamore ea moqoqo ho qala ho qoqa
chat.blockConfirm: Thibela {{name}}? U ke ke ua fumana melaetsa ho bona.
chat.blockError: Ha ho khone ho fumana mosebelisi oa ho thibela.
chat.blockFailed: Ho thibela ho hlolehile (backend ha e so kopane).
chat.encryptedUnavailable: Molaetsa o sireletsehileng (senotlolo ha se teng)
chat.unlockToView: Notlolla senotlolo sa hau ho bona molaetsa ona

messageInput.freeLimit: Moeli oa morero oa mahala: ho hlakola ka bo eona ho fihlela letsatsi le le leng. E tlamahane ho 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Moeli oa ho hlakola ka bo eona oa Premium ke matsatsi a 30. E tlamahane ho 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Ngola molaetsa kapa kenya faele ho romella.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Ho sireletsa ho hlolehile. Molaetsa ha oa romelloa.
messageInput.caption: Tlhaloso (ha ho hlokahale)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Kenyelletso e kholo haholo. Lekola faele e nyenyane.
errors.unsupportedFile: Mofuta oa faele ha o tšehetsoe.
errors.rateLimit: U romella melaetsa ka potlako haholo. Ka kopo lieha.
errors.validation: Phoso ea netefatso. Ka kopo sheba molaetsa oa hau 'me u leke hape.
errors.failedToSend: Ho romella ho hlolehile. U ka leka hape bubble e hlolehileng.

contactList.notJoined: Motho enoa ha a so kene Chatforia.
contactList.couldNotStart: Ha ho khone ho qala moqoqo. Ka kopo leka hape.
contactList.startFailed: Ho qala moqoqo ho hlolehile. Ka kopo leka hape.
contactList.deleteFailed: Ho hlakola motho ea bolokiloeng ho hlolehile. Ka kopo leka hape.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Ho fetola lebitso ho hlolehile. Ka kopo leka hape.
contactList.loadFailed: Ho laolla mabitso ho hlolehile. Ka kopo leka hape.
contactList.callStarted: Ho letsetsa nomoro ena ka nomoro ea hau ea Chatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Ho qala mohala ho hlolehile. Ka kopo leka hape.

startChatModal.title: Qala moqoqo
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Batla ka lebitso, username, kapa nomoro ea mohala
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Ha ho mabitso a lumellanang le patlo ea hau.
startChatModal.noRecentInteractions: Ha ho litšebelisano tsa morao-rao hajoale.

addContactModal.title: Kenya motho ea bolokiloeng
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Kenya nomoro ea mohala kapa username.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: U ke ke ua kenya uena joalo ka motho ea bolokiloeng.
addContactModal.failedToAdd: Ho kenya motho ea bolokiloeng ho hlolehile.

sidebar.loginPrompt: Kena ho fetola litlhophiso tsa hau.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Ha ho media e bolokiloeng sebakeng sa lehae hajoale.

status.captionLabel: Ke eng e ka kelellong ea hau?
status.filesNote: Ho fihlela lifaele tse 5. Ho fela ka 24h ka ho iketsa.

voicemail.unreadDotAria: Letšoao la voicemail e sa baloang

profile.title: Profile ea Mosebelisi
profile.mustLogin: U tlameha ho kena ho sheba litlhophiso.
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Sheba mongolo oa mantlha le phetolelo
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Sheba mongolo oa mantlha le phetolelo e bapileng
profile.enableReadReceipts: Nts'etsa pele litlaleho tsa ho bala
profile.autoDeleteSeconds: Metsotsoana ho fihlela ho hlakola ka bo eona
profile.saveError: Phoso: Ha ho khone ho boloka litlhophiso
profile.noPrivateKey: Ha ho senotlolo sa poraefete sesebelisoeng sena ho romella.
profile.setBackupPassword: Beha password ho sireletsa backup ea hau:
profile.enterBackupPassword: Kenya password bakeng sa backup ena:
profile.importSuccess: Senotlolo sa poraefete se kentsoe sesebelisoeng sena.
profile.importFailed: Ho kenya senotlolo ho hlolehile (password e fosahetseng kapa faele e senyehileng).
profile.keysRotated: Pair e ncha ea linotlolo e hlahisitsoe le senotlolo sa sechaba se rometsoeng.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Senotlolo sa hau sa poraefete ha se tsoe sesebelisoeng sena. Romella kopi e sireletsoeng ka password ho e tsosolosa sesebelisoeng se seng.
profile.backupSync: Backup ea Senotlolo sa Ho Sireletsa
profile.themeFreeNotice: U le Free—sebelisa khetho e potlakileng ea Sun/Moon ka tlaase. Ntlafatsa ho notlolla lihlooho tse ling.
profile.backupTitle: Backups tse Sireletsehileng & Ho Lumellana ha Lisebelisoa
profile.backupDesc: Boloka senotlolo sa hau sa ho sireletsa ho tsosolosa melaetsa ea hau ka tšireletso sesebelisoeng se seng.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Hlakola ha app e sa tsepamisitsoe
profile.planLoadFailed: Ho laolla morero oa hau ho hlolehile.
profile.freePlanCopy: U le morerong oa mahala. Ntlafatsa ho notlolla likarolo tse ling joalo ka backups, linomoro tse eketsehileng, le likhetho tsa tšireletso tse tsoetseng pele.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ha ho khone ho bula portal ea billing. Ka kopo leka hape.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Ntsebise haeba molaetsa oa ka o kopitsoa
profile.unfollowFailed: Ho tlohela ho latela ho hlolehile
profile.followHint: Litlaleho tsa bona li tla hlaha moqoqong oa Following haeba ba romella ka bamameli ba Balateli (kapa Sechaba).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Ho na le phoso karolong ena.
profile.callTextForwardingTitle: Ho fetisetsa mehala le/ kapa melaetsa
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Fetisetsa mehala e tlang le melaetsa ho mohala oa hau o netefalitsoeng kapa email. Mehala/melaetsa e tsoang e ka bontša nomoro ea hau ea Chatforia.
profile.forwardSaved: Litlhophiso tsa ho fetisetsa li bolokiloe
profile.errE164: Kenya nomoro e nepahetseng ea E.164 (mohl., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha bonyane sebaka se le seng (mohala kapa email).
profile.errQuietHours: Lihora tsa khutso li tlameha ho ba lipakeng tsa 0 le 23.
profile.ageBandPlaceholder: Khetha sebaka sa lilemo tsa hau
profile.ageBandHint: Re boloka feela sebaka sa lilemo (eseng letsatsi la tsoalo ea hau ea 'nete). Sena se sebelisoa ho boloka lipara tsa Random Chat li leka-lekane.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Sebelisa ho tsoana ka lilemo ho Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Ha e butsoe, re leka ho u kopanya le batho ba sebaka sa lilemo tse lumellanang.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Ke mang eo u ka kopanngoang le eena?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Bacha ba lilemo tse 13-17 ba kopanngoa feela le bacha ba bang. Batho ba baholo ba ke ke ba kopanngoa le bacha.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Bakeng sa tšireletso, liakhaonto tse sebakeng sa lilemo tse 13–17 li ka kopanngoa feela le liakhaonto tse ling tsa 13–17 ho Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Lumella Ria ho hopola lintho tseo u mo bolellang tsona
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Ha sena se butsoe, Foria e ka sebelisa moqoqo oa hau oa Random Chat oa khale (feela le uena) ho boloka moqoqo o tsamaea. U ka e tima nako efe kapa efe.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Hlakola voicemail ka bo eona kamora (matsatsi)
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Tlohela e le blank ho boloka ka ho sa feleng
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Email ea ho romella litsebiso tsa voicemail
profile.voicemailGreetingText: Tlhaloso ea lentsoe ea ho amohela
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: E sebelisoa ha tlhaloso ea lentsoe ea hau e sa fumanehe.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Tlhaloso ea voicemail e khoasolitsoe ka katleho
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Ho khoasolla tlhaloso ea voicemail ho hlolehile
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemail e tsoang linomorong tsa hau tsa Chatforia e bolokiloe ho inbox ea Voicemail ea hau. U ka nts'etsa pele ho ngola le ho fetisetsa ho merero e tšehetsoeng.
profile.portHint: U batla ho boloka nomoro ea hau ea hajoale? U ka e kenya ho Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Fumana data ea mohala bakeng sa Chatforia ha u le hole le Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Laola morero oa mohala oa Chatforia, linomoro, ho fetisetsa, le ho kenya nomoro.

options.heading: Khetha hore na u batla ho sebelisa Chatforia joang
options.subheading: U ka fumana nomoro e ncha ea Chatforia, kapa u tlise nomoro ea hau ea hajoale ho tsoa ho mofani e mong.
options.newNumber: Fumana nomoro e ncha ea Chatforia
options.portNumber: Kenya nomoro ea hau ea hajoale ho Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Kenya nomoro ea hau ea hajoale
port.subheading: Tlisa nomoro ea hau ea mohala ea hajoale ho tsoa ho mofani oa hau ea hajoale ho Chatforia. Netefatsa hore lintlha li lumellana hantle le akhaonto ea mofani oa hau ho qoba tieho.
port.phoneNumberLabel: Nomoro ea mohala eo u batlang ho e kenya
port.success: Kopo ea ho kenya e rometsoe! Re tla u tsebisa.

status.heading: Boemo ba ho kenya
status.subheading: Latela boemo ba likopo tsa hau tsa ho kenya nomoro.
status.loadError: Ho laolla likopo tsa ho kenya ho hlolehile.
status.none: Ha ho ts'ebetso ea ho kenya hajoale.

wireless.dataLow: Data ea hau e ntse e fela.
wireless.expiresIn: E fela ka mor'a matsatsi a {{days}}
wireless.exhausted: Data ea hau e felile. Reka pakete e ncha ho tsoela pele ho sebelisa data ea mohala.

family.title: Lelapa
family.loading: Ho laolla lintlha tsa lelapa la hau…

error.load: Ho laolla lintlha tsa lelapa ho hlolehile.
error.invite: Ha ho khone ho bopa memo. Netefatsa hore u mong'a lelapa 'me u leke hape.
error.checkout: Ha ho khone ho qala ho lefa bakeng sa morero oa Lelapa. Ka kopo leka hape.

billing.myPlanError: Ha ho khone ho laolla morero oa hau.
billing.freePlanCopy: U le morerong oa mahala. Ntlafatsa ho notlolla likarolo tse ling.
billing.portalError: Ha ho khone ho bula portal ea billing hona joale.
billing.cancelNowHelp: U ka laola kapa ua khansela subscription ea hau ho portal ea billing, kapa u khansela hang-hang ka tlaase.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Na u na le bonnete ba hore u batla ho khansela morero oa hau hang-hang? Sena se ke ke sa khutlisoa.
billing.cancelNowError: Ha ho khone ho khansela morero oa hau hona joale. Ka kopo leka hape kapa sebelisa Laola billing.

none.title: Ha ho lelapa le behiloeng hajoale
none.body: Ho bopa Lelapa la Chatforia le letamo le arolelanoeng la data, qala morero oa Lelapa.

data.heading: Letamo le arolelanoeng la data
data.caption: Litho tsohle li arolelana letamo lena. Re tla u lemosa ha u atamela moeli oa hau.

invite.title: Mema setho se secha
invite.body: Romella email kapa link ho mema motho ho letamo la data la lelapa la hau le arolelanoeng.
invite.expiryHint: Link ena e fela ka mor'a matsatsi a seng makae. U ka lula u bopa e ncha.

join.title: Kena lelapa
join.body: U memetsoe ho kena Lelapa la Chatforia le ho arolelana letamo la bona la data.
join.success: U kene lelapa lena. Hona joale u arolelana letamo la bona la data.
join.error: Ha ho khone ho u kenya lelapa lena. Memo e ka 'na ea se ke ea sebetsa kapa ea fela.

premium.heading: Eya Premium
premium.description: Notlolla likarolo tsa matla & tlosa lipapatso.

upgrade.title: Ntlafatsa
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Qala ka morero oa rona oa mahala o tšehetsoeng ka lipapatso. Eya ntle le lipapatso ka Plus, kapa notlolla likarolo tsa matla ka Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Khetha morero oa app, kenya lipakete tsa data bakeng sa hau, kapa arolelana data le lelapa la hau — tsohle sebakeng se le seng.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Qala ka morero oa rona oa mahala o tšehetsoeng ka lipapatso. Eya ntle le lipapatso ka Plus, kapa notlolla likarolo tsa matla ka Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Kenya data ea eSIM ea lefats'e e le hore Chatforia e lule e sebetsa le ha u le hole le Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Bopa letamo la data le arolelanoeng bakeng sa lelapa la hau le laola tšebeliso ea bohle sebakeng se le seng.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Notlolla likarolo tsa matla & tlosa lipapatso.

scheduleBanner.title: Subscription e tla fela
scheduleBanner.body: U tla khutlela ho Free ka

free.title: Mahala
free.desc: Qala ho romella melaetsa ka mahala. E loketse haeba u leka Chatforia feela.

features.chat: Moqoqo oa nako ea 'nete oa 1:1 le sehlopha, hammoho le mehala ea lentsoe le video
features.media: Arolelana litšoantšo, melaetsa ea lentsoe, le livideo tse khutšoane
features.ai: Likarabo tse bohlale tsa AI le phetolelo ea hang-hang (tšebeliso e nepahetseng)
features.disappearing: Melaetsa e nyamelang le taolo ea mantlha ea tšireletso
features.ads: Mahala ka ho sa feleng ka lipapatso ho app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Lintho tsohle tsa bohlokoa, ntle le lipapatso. E loketse ho romella melaetsa le ho letsetsa letsatsi le letsatsi.

features.allFree: Ntho e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ho Free, ntle le lipapatso
features.forwarding: Fetisetsa mehala le melaetsa ho nomoro ea hau ea 'nete ea mohala
features.history: Histori ea melaetsa e telele (ho fihlela likhoeli tse 6)
features.support: Thuso e potlakileng ha ho na le phoso

plus.ctaPublic: Fumana Plus – tsoela pele ho kena

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Khoeli le Khoeli)
premiumMonthly.desc: Boiphihlelo bo felletseng ba Chatforia: lisebelisoa tsa matla tsa AI, ho iketsetsa, le thuso e tlang pele.

features.plusAll: Ntho e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ho Plus
features.themes: Notlolla lihlooho tsohle tsa mebala ea premium le ho iketsetsa app
features.ai: Lisebelisoa tsa matla tsa AI tsa Premium feela bakeng sa ho ngola bocha, likarabo tse bohlale, le likakaretso
features.support: Thuso e tlang pele ha u hloka thuso haholo

premiumMonthly.ctaPublic: Notlolla Premium – tsoela pele ho kena
premiumMonthly.aria: Ntlafatsa ho Premium Khoeli le Khoeli

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Selemo)
premiumAnnual.desc: Boloka ho eketsehileng ha u lefisoa ka selemo — ho kenyelletsa lihlooho tse eketsehileng tsa mebala, lisebelisoa tsa AI, le thuso e tlang pele.

features.allPremium: Ntho e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ho Premium Khoeli le Khoeli — ho kenyelletsa lihlooho tse eketsehileng tsa mebala
features.save25: Boloka hoo e ka bang 30% ha ho bapisoa le ho lefa khoeli le khoeli
features.bestFor: E loketse basebelisi ba matla, basebetsi ba hole, le baeti ba boima

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Boloka 30% ka selemo – tsoela pele ho kena
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Lefisoa esale pele. Khansela nako efe kapa efe. Ha ho litefiso tse patehileng.

marketing.freeDesc: Qala ho romella melaetsa ka mahala.
marketing.plusDesc: E theko e tlaase ka ho fetisisa ea boiphihlelo bo se nang lipapatso.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Likarolo tse felletseng, melumo ea mohala, le lisebelisoa tsa matla tsa AI.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Boloka ho eketsehileng ha u lefisoa ka selemo.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Lefisoa esale pele. Khansela nako efe kapa efe. Ha ho litefiso tse patehileng.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (lipakete tsa data tsa eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Kenya data ea lefats'e ho boloka Chatforia e sebetsa le ha u se na Wi-Fi. Litheko li fetoha ka bo eona ho latela naha le chelete ea hau.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Khetha pakete ea data ea lefats'e ea hang-hang e le hore Chatforia e lule e sebetsa ha u le leetong kapa hole le Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Ha re rekise lipakete tsa data tse ka tlaase ho 3 GB.
mobile.localEqualsFallback: Ea lehae = naha ea hau ea hajoale

features.heavyUse: Data ea lebelo le phahameng bakeng sa tšebeliso e boima
features.throttle: Lebelo le ka lieha ka mor'a tšebeliso e phahameng
features.noContract: Pakete ea hang-hang, ha ho konteraka

disclaimer.devices: Lipakete tsa data tsa eSIM li hloka sesebelisoa se lumellanang le eSIM le se notlolotsoeng. Ho fumaneha ho fapana ka mofuta oa mohala, mofani, le naha. Ho koahela le lebelo li fapana ka sebaka.

small.title: Pakete ea ho qala
small.desc: E kenyelletsa 3 GB ea data ea lebelo le phahameng — e loketse ho romella melaetsa e bobebe le mehala ea nako e khutšoane.
small.bestFor: Maeto a khutšoane, ho romella melaetsa e bobebe, le mehala ea nako e khutšoane
small.aria: Reka pakete ea Starter eSIM data

medium.title: Pakete ea baeti
medium.desc: E kenyelletsa 5 GB ea data ea lebelo le phahameng bakeng sa maeto, ho tsamaea, le mehala ea VoIP e tloaelehileng.
medium.bestFor: Maeto a beke, mehala ea VoIP e tloaelehileng, le limmapa
medium.aria: Reka pakete ea Traveler eSIM data

large.title: Pakete ea matla
large.desc: E kenyelletsa 10 GB ea data ea lebelo le phahameng bakeng sa moqoqo o boima, mehala, le video ho netweke ea Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Moqoqo o boima, mehala, video, le tšebeliso ea hotspot
large.aria: Reka pakete ea Power user eSIM data

compare.title: Bapisa lipakete tsa data tsa eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Tšebeliso ea 'nete ea data e itšetleha ka hore na u sebelisa Chatforia joang (lentsoe, video, media, le lisebelisoa tse ling tsa mohala oa hau).

family.title: Chatforia Family (data e arolelanoeng)
family.subtitle: Arolelana letamo le le leng la data ho lelapa la hau. Bili e le 'ngoe, liakhaonto tse ngata tsa Chatforia, ho koahela lefats'e.

small.title: Lelapa le Nyenyane
small.desc: E kenyelletsa 20 GB ea data ea lebelo le phahameng e arolelanoeng — e loketse basebelisi ba bobebe ba 2–3.

medium.title: Lelapa le Bohareng
medium.desc: E kenyelletsa 40 GB ea data ea lebelo le phahameng e arolelanoeng — e loketse litho tse sebetsang tsa 3–5.

large.title: Lelapa le Leholo
large.desc: E kenyelletsa 80 GB ea data ea lebelo le phahameng e arolelanoeng — bakeng sa malapa a matla a lulang a le inthaneteng.

feature.shared: Letamo la data le arolelanoeng bakeng sa lelapa la hau
feature.members: Mema ho fihlela litho tse 4 tse eketsehileng
feature.membersMore: E loketse litho tse 3–5 tse sebetsang
feature.manage: Laola meeli bakeng sa setho se seng le se seng
feature.topUp: Kenya lipakete tse ling nako efe kapa efe
feature.bestValue: Boleng bo botle ka ho fetisisa ka GB
feature.fairUse: Ho itšetleha ho leano la tšebeliso e nepahetseng le meeli ea lehae

family.disclaimer: Lipakete tsa lelapa li bopa kapa li tlatsetsa letamo la data le arolelanoeng. U ka mema le ho tlosa litho nako efe kapa efe.
family.footnote: Lipakete tsa lelapa li arolelana letamo le le leng la data ho liakhaonto tse hokahantsoeng tsa Chatforia. Ho fumaneha le meeli ho itšetleha ka naha ea hau le melao ea lehae.

why.title: Hobaneng batho ba fetela ho Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia e u fa nomoro ea 'nete ea mohala, phetolelo e bohlale, le tsela e hlakileng ea ho ea ntle le lipapatso ha u se u lokile.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lipapatso tse bobebe ho Free, ntlafatso e bonolo ea Plus ha u se u lokile, le lisebelisoa tsa Premium tseo TextNow e sa li faneng.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App ea sejoale-joale, moralo oa lefats'e oa pele, le phetolelo e hahiloeng ka har'a eona ho fapana le ho fetisetsa mehala ea khale.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs li-app tsa moqoqo
messengers.body: Romella linomoro tsa 'nete tsa mohala — eseng basebelisi ba app feela — ka AI le boemo bo hahiloeng ka har'a eona. E loketse haeba u tsoa ho li-app joalo ka TextFree kapa TextMe.

feature.translation: Phetolelo e hahiloeng ka har'a eona ka bo eona
feature.aiTools: Lisebelisoa tsa AI (ho ngola bocha, likarabo, likakaretso)

why.disclaimer: Papiso e thehiloe ho tlhahisoleseling e fumanehang phatlalatsa mme e ka fetoha ha nako e ntse e tsamaea. Li-app tse ling tsa ho romella melaetsa tsa mahala joalo ka TextFree kapa TextMe ka kakaretso li tšoana le TextNow.

faq.title: Lipotso tse atisang ho botsoa ka litheko & merero

free.q: Na morero oa Mahala o hlile o mahala?
free.a: E. Morero oa Mahala o kenyelletsa nomoro ea Chatforia, ho letsetsa, le ho romella melaetsa ka lipapatso. U ka lula ho Free halelele kamoo u batlang, kapa u ntlafatsa ho tlosa lipapatso le ho notlolla likarolo tse ling.

plusPremium.q: Phapang ke efe lipakeng tsa Plus le Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus e tlosa lipapatso le ho atolosa histori ea melaetsa ea hau — e phethahetseng bakeng sa tšebeliso ea letsatsi le letsatsi. Premium e eketsa ho iketsetsa ho eketsehileng, lisebelisoa tsa AI bakeng sa ho ngola bocha le likarabo, le thuso e tlang pele bakeng sa basebelisi ba boima.

esim.q: Lipakete tsa data tsa eSIM li sebetsa kae?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile e sebelisa ho koahela eSIM ea lefats'e. Ho fumaneha ho itšetleha ka naha ea hau le sesebelisoa. U tla bona likhetho tse tšehetsoeng nakong ea ho kenya tšebetsong ka har'a app.

cancel.q: Na nka khansela kapa fetola merero nako efe kapa efe?
cancel.a: E. U ka laola kapa ua khansela subscription ea hau ho leqephe la billing ka har'a app. Liphetoho li qala ho sebetsa qetellong ea nako ea billing ea hau ea hajoale.

family.q: Lipakete tsa Lelapa li sebetsa joang?
family.a: Lipakete tsa Lelapa li bopa letamo la data le arolelanoeng ho liakhaonto tse ngata tsa Chatforia. Motho a le mong o lefa bili, 'me u ka mema kapa ua tlosa litho le ho beha meeli ho motho ka mong.

gettingStarted.title: Ho Qala
gettingStarted.subtitle: E ncha ho Chatforia? Tataiso ena e potlakileng e bontša lintho tsa bohlokoa e le hore u ka ba sebetsang ka metsotso.

alert.text: Tataiso ena e tla hola ha re qala likarolo tse ncha. Haeba ho na le ntho e sieo, re tsebise ka

section1.title: 1) Bopa akhaonto ea hau
section1.loginText: ka akhaonto ea hau e teng.

section2.title: 2) Qala ho romella melaetsa
section2.item1: Bopa DM kapa Sehlopha 'me u romelle molaetsa oa hau oa pele.
section2.item2: Sebelisa phetolelo ea hang-hang ho qoqa ho lipuo tse 100+.
section2.item3: Leka melaetsa e nyamelang le litlaleho tsa ho bala ho Profile → Tšireletso.

section3.title: 3) Tsoela pele ho feta
section3.item1: U ka ntlafatsa ho morero o lefelletsoeng nako efe kapa efe ka har'a app.
section3.item2: Hang ha u kene, u ka hokahanya lisebelisoa tse ling le ho beha backups tse sireletsehileng ho Litlhophiso tsa app.

account.q: Ke tla bopa kapa ho khutlisa akhaonto ea ka joang?
account.a: Khoasolla app kapa sebelisa web, tlanya “Bopa akhaonto”, netefatsa email/mohala oa hau. Ho khutlisa, sebelisa “U lebetse password”.

privacy.q: Na melaetsa e sireletsehileng ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong?
privacy.a: E. Melaetsa le mehala e sireletsehileng ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong ka ho iketsa. Ke uena le moamoheli feela le ka bala tsona.

translate.q: Phetolelo ea hang-hang e sebetsa joang?
translate.a: Nts'etsa pele “Fetolela ka bo eona” ho Litlhophiso → Ponahalo & Puo. Re fetolela sesebelisoeng moo ho tšehetsoeng, ho seng joalo ka li-API tse sireletsehileng tse nang le metadata e fokolang.

contact.a: Re fihlela rona ho support@chatforia.com. Kenya litšoantšo le mofuta oa app ea hau.

contact.title: Re ikopanye le rona
contact.successMsg: Ke a leboha—sehlopha sa rona se tla araba ka email.
contact.errorSend: Ha ho khone ho romella. Ka kopo romella support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Leano lena la Tšireletso le hlalosa hore na Chatforia (“rona”, “rona”) e bokella, e sebelisa, le ho arolelana tlhahisoleseling joang ha u sebelisa li-app le litšebeletso tsa rona. Re etsa moralo oa Chatforia ho fokotsa data eo re ka e fumanang.

infoWeCollect.title: Tlhahisoleseling eo re e bokellang
infoWeCollect.account: Lintlha tsa akhaonto (mohl., email/mohala) ho bopa le ho sireletsa akhaonto ea hau.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Litaba tse sireletsehileng (melaetsa/mehala) li sireletsehileng ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong; re ke ke ra li bala.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/tšebeliso joalo ka litlaleho tsa ho senyeha, mofuta oa sesebelisoa, kapa analytics e bonolo ho ntlafatsa ts'ebetso.

sms.title: Linomoro tsa mehala ea mohala le SMS
sms.body: Haeba u khetha ho fana ka nomoro ea mohala ea mohala, re e sebelisa ho nts'etsa pele likarolo tse kang ho netefatsa akhaonto, litsebiso tsa ho kena, le ho romella melaetsa ho tsoa ho mosebelisi ho mosebelisi ka SMS moo ho tšehetsoeng. Re ka romella melaetsa ea SMS ea ts'ebetso e amanang le akhaonto ea hau le ts'ebetso ho Chatforia. U ka khetha ho tsoa ho amohela melaetsa ea SMS nako efe kapa efe ka ho araba ka lentsoe la ho tsoa le lumellang (joalo ka “STOP”) kapa ka ho fetola likhetho tsa litsebiso ho app. Re sa rekise nomoro ea hau ea mohala kapa re e sebelise bakeng sa ho bapatsa ho sa amaneng.
sms.addRecipient: Kenya moamoheli ka holimo ho qala…

howWeUse.title: Re sebelisa tlhahisoleseling joang
howWeUse.provide: Fana le ho sireletsa tšebeletso (netefatso, ho lemoha spam/abuse).

sharing.title: Ho arolelana
sharing.body: Ha re rekise data ea botho. Re ka arolelana data e fokolang le ba sebetsang (mohl., litsebiso tsa push, analytics) tlas'a likonteraka tse thata.

rights.title: Litokelo tsa hau
rights.body: Ho latela sebaka sa hau (mohl., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), u ka kopa ho fihlella, ho lokisa, ho hlakola, kapa ho khetha ho tsoa ho ts'ebetso e itseng. Ikopanye le: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Ho boloka data & tšireletso
retention.body: Re boloka feela se hlokahalang ho tsamaisa tšebeletso le ho sebelisa tšireletso ea maemo a indasteri. Litaba tsa E2E li ke ke tsa notloloha ke rona.

children.title: Bana
children.body: Chatforia ha e lebisitsoe ho bana ba ka tlaase ho 13 (kapa joalo ka ha ho hlokahala ke molao oa hau oa lehae).

changes.title: Liphetoho
changes.body: Re tla romella lintlafatso mona 'me re ntlafatse letsatsi la “E ntlafalitsoe la ho qetela”.

contact.title: Ikopanye le rona
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ka ho sebelisa Chatforia u lumellana le melao ena. Haeba u sa lumellane, se sebelise tšebeletso.

accounts.title: Liakhaonto
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Fana ka tlhahisoleseling e nepahetseng 'me u boloke li-credentials tse sireletsehileng.
accounts.itemResponsibility: U ikarabella bakeng sa ts'ebetso ho akhaonto ea hau.

acceptableUse.title: Tšebeliso e amohelehang
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Ha ho litaba tse seng molaong, tse hlekefetsang, kapa tse tlolang; ha ho spam kapa abuse e iketsang.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Re ka emisa/khakola bakeng sa tlolo.

sms.title: Ho buisana ka SMS
sms.body: Haeba u fana ka nomoro ea mohala ea mohala, u lumellana hore Chatforia e ka u romella melaetsa ea SMS e amanang le akhaonto ea hau le tšebeliso ea tšebeletso, joalo ka litsebiso tsa ho kena, litsebiso tsa tšireletso, le melaetsa e amanang le moqoqo oo u o qalang kapa u nkang karolo ho oona. Ha re sebelise SMS bakeng sa melaetsa ea ho bapatsa kapa ho bapatsa ntle le tumello ea hau e hlakileng. Litefiso tse tloaelehileng tsa molaetsa le data li ka sebetsa. U ka khetha ho tsoa ho melaetsa ea SMS nako efe kapa efe ka ho araba ka lentsoe la ho tsoa le lumellang (mohlala, “STOP”) kapa ka ho ntlafatsa litlhophiso tsa litsebiso ho app.

yourContent.title: Litaba tsa hau
yourContent.body: U boloka litokelo ho litaba tsa hau. U re fa litokelo tse hlokahalang ho tsamaisa tšebeletso (mohl., ho tsamaisa, ho boloka, phetolelo).

disclaimer.title: Litlhaloso & boikarabelo
disclaimer.body: Tšebeletso e fanoa “joalo ka ha e le” ntle le li-waranti. Ho fihlela boemong bo felletseng bo lumelloang ke molao, Chatforia ha e ikarabelle bakeng sa tšenyo e sa tobang kapa e latelang.

changes.title: Liphetoho
changes.body: Re ka ntlafatsa melao ena; ho tsoela pele ho sebelisa ka mor'a liphetoho ho bolela ho amohela.

contact.title: Ikopanye le rona
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: U se ke ua Rekisa kapa ua Arolelana Tlhahisoleseling ea ka ea Botho
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ha e rekise tlhahisoleseling ea botho. Baahi ba California ba ka romella likopo tlas'a CPRA ba sebelisa konopo e ka tlaase.

cookies.title: Litlhophiso tsa Cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia e sebelisa li-cookie tse fokolang (mohl., session, tšireletso). Ha re sebelise li-cookie tsa lipapatso tsa batho ba bang. Laola li-cookie ka litlhophiso tsa sebatli sa hau.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Ha ho khone ho laolla boemo ba nomoro ea mohala.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Ha ho nomoro e abetsoeng. Khetha e 'ngoe ka khoutu ea sebaka ho qala ho romella melaetsa.

startChatModal.title: Qala moqoqo
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Ngola lebitso, username, mohala, kapa email…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Ngola username kapa mohala 'me u tlanye Batla.
startChatModal.pickAtLeastOne: Khetha bonyane moamoheli a le mong.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Menyetla ea mohala/email e tla fumaneha ka mor'a hore u e boloke e le mabitso.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Ho qala moqoqo ka ba amohelang ba khethiloeng ho hlolehile.
startChatModal.firstMessageOptional: Molaetsa oa pele (ha ho hlokahale empa o khothalletsoa)

sounds.freeNotice: U le Free — melumo ea premium e bontšitsoe empa e notletsoe. Ntlafatsa ho notlolla tsohle.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Karolo ena e hloka morero oa Premium.

aiSettings.title: Litlhophiso tsa AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Laola phetolelo, likarabo tse bohlale, le likarabo tsa ForiaBot ka bo eona.
aiSettings.autoTranslateIncoming: Fetolela melaetsa e tlang ka bo eona
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Sheba mongolo oa mantlha le phetolelo e bapileng
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Romella melaetsa e 'maloa e fumanoeng (e hloekisitsoe) ho AI ho fana ka likarabo tse potlakileng.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Hlakola mantsoe a sa lokang ho litlhahiso tsa AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Haeba e butsoe, litlhahiso tse khutlisoang ke AI li tla ba le mantsoe a tšoailoeng a hlakotsoeng
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Nts'etsa pele karabo ka bo eona ha ke le mosebetsing
aiSettings.autoReplyMode: Mokhoa oa karabo ka bo eona
aiSettings.activeUntilOptional: E sebetsa ho fihlela (ha ho hlokahale)
aiSettings.saveFailed: Ho boloka litlhophiso tsa AI ho hlolehile

accessibilitySettings.title: Ho Fumaneha & Litsebiso
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Likhetho tse etsang hore Chatforia e be bonolo ho e sebelisa ntle le ho itšetleha ho molumo.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: E qala ka boholo bo tloaelehileng. Eketseha haeba u rata mongolo o moholo ho litlhophiso tsa ho fumaneha.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Litsebiso tsa pono bakeng sa melaetsa & mehala
Sheba li-banner le ho qala ha sehlooho e le hore u se ke ua lahleha.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Thothomela ho melaetsa e ncha (ha e tšehetsoa)
Qala ho thothomela ha sesebelisoa ka litsebiso.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash skrine ho mohala o tlang
Flash e khanyang ka nako e khutšoane ha mohala o lla.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotes: Ngola ka bo eona linoto tsa lentsoe
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Kenya transcript ho melaetsa ea molumo eo u e fumanang.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlerts: Litsebiso tsa pono bakeng sa melaetsa & mehala
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Sheba li-banner le ho qala ha sehlooho e le hore u se ke ua lahleha.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Thothomela ho melaetsa e ncha (ha e tšehetsoa)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Qala ho thothomela ha sesebelisoa ka litsebiso.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Flash skrine ho mohala o tlang
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Flash e khanyang ka nako e khutšoane ha mohala o lla.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong ka thata
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Boloka feela ciphertext ho seva. E tima AI/Phetolelo le ho sheba pele ha botsamaisi.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Lisebelisoa tse Hokahantsoeng
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: Ha ho lisebelisoa tse hokahantsoeng li fumanoe.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Batla ka alias, lebitso, username, kapa mohala
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Mekhoa e 'maloa e potlakileng ea ho qala.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Arolelana link ea memo ea hau ho qala ho qoqa hang-hang.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Lula u hokahane ha u le tseleng ka Chatforia bakeng sa iOS le Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Keletso: Melaetsa ea hau e lula e lumellane ho web le mohala.

randomChat.title: Moqoqo oa Tšohanyetso
randomChat.description: Kopana le motho e mocha hang-hang. Re tla u kopanya 'me re bule kamore ea moqoqo ea nakoana. Qoqa ka ho se tsejoe pele. Kenya Motsoalle hamorao haeba ho utloahala ho lokile.
randomChat.findMatch: Mphumanele motho eo ke ka kopanngoang le eena
randomChat.partnerDisconnected: Motho eo u kopaneng le eena o khaotse.
randomChat.noPartner: Ha ho motho eo u kopaneng le eena hajoale.
randomChat.partnerLeft: Motho eo u kopaneng le eena o tsamaile.
randomChat.saveGuard: Ke moqoqo oa motho ho motho feela o ka bolokoang
randomChat.partner: Motho eo u kopaneng le eena
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Re boloka feela sebaka sa lilemo (eseng letsatsi la tsoalo ea hau ea 'nete). Sena se sebelisoa ho boloka lipara tsa Random Chat li leka-lekane. Ho kopana le batho (eseng RiaBot feela), beha sebaka sa lilemo tsa hau ho Litlhophiso → Lilemo & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Beha sebaka sa lilemo tsa hau ho Profile → Lilemo & Random Chat ho kopanngoa le batho.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ho kopana le batho (eseng RiaBot feela), beha sebaka sa lilemo tsa hau ho Litlhophiso → Lilemo & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Kopana le motho e mocha hang-hang, kapa khetha ho qoqa le Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Beha sebaka sa lilemo tsa hau ho Profile → Lilemo & Random Chat ho kopanngoa le batho.
randomChat.messageMatch: Romella motho eo u kopaneng le eena...

ria.intro: Hey motho eo 👋 Ke Ria. Ke eng e ka kelellong ea hau?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 Ke teng. Ke eng e ka kelellong ea hau?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 U batla ho bua ka eng kajeno?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}!! Ke mamelile — ke eng e tsoang?
greetings.long4: Ke thabile ho u bona, {{name}} 👋 Ke eng e ka kelellong ea hau kajeno?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 😊 U batla ho tšolla, ho botsa, kapa ho qoqa feela?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Ke na le nako — u batla ho bua ka eng?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, ke ntse ke teng. Ke eng e tsoang?
greetings.short2: Welcome hape {{name}} 👋 Ho na le ntho e 'ngoe eo u batlang ho e eketsa?
greetings.short3: Hape, {{name}}? 😊 Mpolelle ke eng e ka kelellong ea hau.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} 👋 U lokile ho tsoela pele moo re siileng?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}!! U na le ntho e ncha e ka kelellong ea hau?

login.title: Tsoela pele ho Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Kena ho akhaonto ea hau ea Chatforia
login.subtitle: Kena ho akhaonto ea hau ea Chatforia
login.googleUnavailable: Ho kena ka Google ha ho fumanehe
login.appleUnavailable: Ho kena ka Apple ha ho fumanehe

forgot.title: U lebetse Password
forgot.helper: Kenya email eo u e sebelisitse ho bopa akhaonto ea hau ea Chatforia 'me re tla u romella link e sireletsehileng ho khutlisa password ea hau.
forgot.emailInvalid: Ka kopo kenya email e nepahetseng.
forgot.genericError: Ha ho khone ho sebetsa kopo. Ka kopo leka hape ka nakoana.
forgot.sending: Ho romella link ea ho khutlisa...
forgot.sentHelper: Haeba akhaonto e teng ka email eo, re rometse link ea ho khutlisa password. E ka nka metsotso e seng mekae ho fihla. Netefatsa hore u sheba spam kapa folder ea promotions.

login.ssoUnavailable: Ho kena ka single-sign-on ha ho fumanehe hajoale. Sebelisa username & password ho e-na le hoo.

error.missing: Ka kopo kenya li-credentials tsa hau.
error.unprocessable: Kopo e fosahetseng. Sheba username/email le password ea hau.
error.deviceLimit: Moeli oa sesebelisoa o fihletsoe bakeng sa morero oa Mahala. Tsoa ho sesebelisoa se seng kapa ntlafatsa ho Premium ho hokahanya lisebelisoa tse ling.
error.premiumRequired: Ketso ena e hloka morero oa Premium.

dialer.recentsEmpty: Ha ho mehala ea morao-rao hajoale.
dialer.noRecents: Ha ho mehala ea morao-rao hajoale.

support.heading: Re ka u thusa joang?
support.contactIntro: Re tla u romella karabo ka email. Kenya lintlha ho re thusa ho hlahisa bothata.
support.sent: Molaetsa o rometsoe. Re tla araba ka email.
support.sendError: Ha ho khone ho romella. Romella support@chatforia.com ho e-na le hoo.

account.q: Ke tla bopa kapa ho khutlisa akhaonto ea ka joang?
account.a: Khoasolla app kapa sebelisa web, tlanya “Bopa akhaonto”, netefatsa email/mohala oa hau. Ho khutlisa, sebelisa “U lebetse password”.

privacy.q: Na melaetsa e sireletsehileng ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong?
privacy.a: E. Melaetsa le mehala e sireletsehileng ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong ka ho iketsa. Ke uena le moamoheli feela le ka bala tsona.

translate.q: Phetolelo ea hang-hang e sebetsa joang?
translate.a: Nts'etsa pele “Fetolela ka bo eona” ho Litlhophiso → Ponahalo & Puo. Re fetolela sesebelisoeng moo ho tšehetsoeng, ho seng joalo ka li-API tse sireletsehileng tse nang le metadata e fokolang.

contact.a: Re fihlela rona ho support@chatforia.com. Kenya litšoantšo le mofuta oa app ea hau.

encryptionRecovery.title: Laola Ho Sireletsa
encryptionRecovery.description: Boloka, tsosolosa, notlolla, kapa qala bocha senotlolo sa hau sa ho sireletsa.

alert.keyRequiredTitle: Senotlolo sa ho sireletsa se hlokahala
alert.keyRequiredBody: Sebatli sena ha se khone ho notlolla melaetsa ea hau e sireletsehileng hajoale. Tsosolosa, notlolla, kapa qala bocha senotlolo sa hau ho tsoela pele.

confirm.reset:
Qala bocha ho sireletsa bakeng sa akhaonto ena?

Melaetsa ea khale e sireletsehileng e ka 'na ea se ke ea baleha ntle le haeba u tsosolosa senotlolo sa mantlha hamorao.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Sena se hlahisa senotlolo se secha sa ho sireletsa bakeng sa akhaonto ea hau. Melaetsa ea khale e sireletsehileng e ka 'na ea se ke ea baleha ntle le haeba u tsosolosa senotlolo sa mantlha hamorao.

footer.doNotSell: U se ke ua Rekisa Lintlha tsa ka

links.do-not-sell-my-info: U se ke ua Rekisa Lintlha tsa ka

press.title: Litaba
press.contactLine: Bakeng sa lipotso tsa mecha ea litaba, re fihlele rona ho
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ke app ea melaetsa ea tšireletso ea pele e etsang hore moqoqo oa lipuo tse fapaneng o be bonolo. Melaetsa e sireletsehileng ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong ka ho iketsa, 'me phetolelo e hahiloeng ka har'a eona e tšehetsa lipuo tse 100+ ka nako ea 'nete. Basebelisi ba ka nts'etsa pele melaetsa e nyamelang, boloka litlaleho tsa ho bala e le khetho, le ho lumellana ho lisebelisoa tse fapaneng. E fumaneha ho iOS, Android, le web.
press.assetsSubtitle: Li-logo, litšoantšo tse nkuoeng, le litšoantšo tsa sehlahisoa.
press.scanTip: U le desktop? Skena ka mohala oa hau ho fumana app.

careers.title: Mesebetsi
careers.intro: Re sehlopha se senyenyane sa motheo se aha Chatforia — molaetsa oa lefats'e oa poraefete o qalang ho web, iOS, le Android. Haeba u tsotella tšireletso, ho sireletsa, le liphihlelo tse monate tsa basebelisi, re thabile ho utloa ho tsoa ho uena.
careers.openRoles: Mesebetsi e bulehileng ea motheo: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Mokhoa oa ho etsa kopo: Sebelisa konopo e ka tlaase ho romella CV ea hau le li-link.
careers.whyBullets:
• Thusa ho aha motheo oa molaetsa o mocha oa lefats'e.
• Romella lintlafatso tse sebelisoang ho web, iOS, le Android.
• Sebetsa ka kotloloho le mothehi ho meralo le tataiso ea sehlahisoa.
• Laola libaka tse nang le tšusumetso e kholo ea stack: melaetsa, lentsoe, video, ho sireletsa, telecom, AI.
• Kena qalong — pele basebelisi ba eketseha.

about.title: Mabapi le Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ke molaetsa o sireletsehileng, oa lipuo tse ngata o nang le ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong, phetolelo ea hang-hang, le ho letsetsa ka lentsoe/video. Morero oa rona o bonolo: thusa batho ho hokahana—ka tšireletso, ka poraefete, le ho feta lipuo.

values.privacy: Tšireletso ea pele: Ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong ka ho iketsa.
values.access: Ho fihlella bohle: Phetolelo ka bo eona ea lipuo tse 100+.
values.control: Taolo: Melaetsa e nyamelang & litlaleho tsa ho bala ke khetho.
values.privacy_aria: Tšireletso ea pele: Ho sireletsa ho tloha qetellong ho ea ho qetellong ka ho iketsa.
values.access_aria: Ho fihlella bohle: Phetolelo ka bo eona ea lipuo tse 100+.
values.control_aria: Taolo: Melaetsa e nyamelang le litlaleho tsa ho bala ke khetho.

about.howDescription: Melaetsa e sireletsehileng sesebelisoeng sa hau pele e tsoa. Phetolelo, backups, le ho lumellana ha lisebelisoa li entsoe ho fokotsa seo seva sa rona se ka se bonang.

advertise.title: Bapatsa ka Chatforia
advertise.description: Fihlela basebelisi ba moqoqo ba ikemiselitseng ka libaka tse nang le tatso, tse sireletsehileng tsa brand. Re fana ka inventory ea banner libakeng tse bonahalang haholo, sponsorships, le promos tsa ntlo. Basebelisi ba premium ha ba bone lipapatso.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Re boetse re fana ka inventory ka Google AdSense. U ka lebisa Chatforia ka ID ea publisher {{pubId}}, kapa sebelisa foromo e ka tlaase bakeng sa sponsorships tse tobileng.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Re boetse re fana ka inventory e itseng ka Google AdSense. Ho na le sponsorships tse tobileng — sebelisa foromo e ka tlaase.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Re phethela inventory ea rona ea lipapatso. Re tsebise ka phutuho ea hau 'me re tla khothaletsa libaka.

why.highSession: Nako e telele ea ho lula le ho lula moqoqong oa UI
why.brandSafe: Mefuta e sireletsehileng ea brand; ho fokotsa nako e hlomphuoang
why.sponsoredMoments: Linako tse tšehetsoeng (mohl., “Qala Moqoqo” modal) li fumaneha
why.deals: Litumellano tse tobileng kapa tse iketsang ka AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Ke a leboha! Kopo ea hau e tseleng. Re tla latela haufinyane.
form.missingRequired: Ka kopo tlatsa lebitso, email, le molaetsa.
form.successToast: Ke a leboha! Re tla ikopanya le uena haufinyane.

form.messagePlaceholder: Ho lebisa, matsatsi, KPI, likhetho tsa libaka…
